objective: Create a state-stratified validation framework that uses V3.48 diagnostic states as future validation strata while blocking performance claims until adjusted/PIT return labels and signal panels are available.
forbidden: Do not read raw daily CSVs.
Do not compute forward returns from unadjusted raw close.
Do not create signal performance metrics without adjusted/PIT labels.
Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not promote any state tag into a trading model.
acceptance: State coverage and stratification plan must be generated.
Signal and label contracts must be explicit.
Readiness must mark performance validation as blocked when labels are missing.
No result guard must show no performance/backtest output was produced.
The final report must separate framework readiness from performance readiness.
